final_prompt.prompt:
Create a children's picture book illustration of a forest scene with cute animals holding a concert.

Style/medium: needs a children's picture book aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a rabbit playing cello, a squirrel playing flute, and other cute animals (multiple)
Scene/backdrop: must include a fairytale mushroom house and rainbow in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, whimsical atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs bright, vibrant, playful colors — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
